title: barleria polhillii subsp. turkanae
intro: Barleria polhillii subsp. turkanae, also known as Turkana barleria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which are effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Barleria polhillii subsp. turkanae include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, and its leaves can be used as a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
